title: August 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 19''' is the 231st day of the year (232nd in leap years). There are 134 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Christopher Malcolm]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Ian McElhinney]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Adam Arkin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Amy Hennig]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Ahmed Best]] is born.
*1973 – [[Nina Fallon]] is born.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'' novelization]] published.
*2008 – ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]'' begins with the release of [[Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|Champions of the Force]].
*2008 – ''[[Deader than a Triton Moon]]'' published online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 44|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 44]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 8|''Star Wars'' (2015) 8]] published.
*2015 – [[Kanan 5|''Kanan'' 5]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 4|''Bounty Hunters'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: Outlaws]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The High Republic: Volume II]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 4 (Phase III)]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars Insider 233|''Star Wars Insider'' 233]] published.
